channel.title: CS Resource Hub
channel.description: A curated directory of resources for Canadian computer science students.

item.title: Real-World Cryptography
item.description: Practical cryptography book covering protocols, encryption, signatures, and key exchange.

item.title: How Linux Works
item.description: Practical guide to Linux internals, boot, storage, networking, shell tools, and processes.

item.title: Game Engine Architecture
item.description: Guide to game engine systems, tools, rendering, animation, physics, and runtime design.

item.title: Database Internals
item.description: Deep dive into database storage engines, replication, partitioning, and transactions.

item.title: WomenHack Montreal
item.description: Inclusive recruiting events for software, data, DevOps, and technology roles.

item.title: Startupfest Montreal
item.description: Canada's premier startup festival bringing together founders, investors, and engineers.

item.title: Richard Tapia Celebration of Diversity in Computing
item.description: Diversity in computing conference with career networking, technical sessions, and recruiting.

item.title: PyCon US
item.description: Python conference with technical talks, tutorials, open-source collaboration, and a job fair.

item.title: Montréal International Game Summit (MIGS)
item.description: B2B game development conference connecting students with studios and technical leaders.

item.title: Montréal Game Developers
item.description: Game development community hosting networking events, technical talks, workshops, and industry meetups.

item.title: Mila Events
item.description: AI research talks, industry seminars, networking, and company-sponsored events.

item.title: L'Événement Carrières
item.description: One of Quebec's largest public hiring exhibitions featuring various Montreal career fairs.

item.title: IVADO AI Internship & Job Fair
item.description: AI internship and job fair connecting students with Quebec companies hosted by Polytechnique Montréal.

item.title: HackerX Montreal
item.description: Speed-interview networking event matching software engineers directly with engineering managers.

item.title: GoSec Conference
item.description: Cybersecurity conference covering cloud, application, offensive, and enterprise security.

item.title: Cybereco Cyberconference
item.description: Enterprise cybersecurity conference on cloud security, identity, and security operations.

item.title: Concordia Internship & Job Search Websites
item.description: Concordia-curated job search website list for internships, new grad roles, and student jobs.

item.title: Concordia Career & Networking Events
item.description: Various career fairs, networking events and recruitment opportunities.

item.title: Concordia CAPS Job Bank
item.description: Concordia job bank hub for internships, on-campus jobs and new grad roles.

item.title: Canadian Undergraduate Technology Conference (CUTC)
item.description: Student-led tech conference connecting undergraduates with industry speakers and workshops.

item.title: C++ Montréal
item.description: Community dedicated to Modern C++, systems programming, and software architecture.

item.title: BSides Montreal
item.description: Community cybersecurity conference with technical talks, workshops, and security networking.

item.title: AWS User Group Montreal
item.description: Community meetups covering AWS architecture, cloud infrastructure, DevOps, and containers.

item.title: Y Combinator Internships
item.description: Internship board connecting students with roles at Y Combinator-backed startups.

item.title: The Intern Group
item.description: Paid global internship placement program with career development and international work experiences.

item.title: Simplify Summer Internship Repository
item.description: GitHub repository tracking software engineering and tech internship opportunities.

item.title: Simplify Jobs
item.description: Internship and early-career job platform with resume tools, tracking, and curated tech roles.

item.title: LinkedIn Jobs
item.description: Professional network and job platform with internship listings across technology fields.

item.title: Levels.fyi Jobs
item.description: Technology job board featuring internships with compensation data and software company roles.

item.title: Job Bank Canada
item.description: Government of Canada job board with student, co-op, and internship opportunities.

item.title: Indeed
item.description: Global job board with internship listings across technology, finance, government, and startups.

item.title: Handshake
item.description: University-focused career platform connecting students with internships and entry-level roles.

item.title: Glassdoor
item.description: Job platform with internship listings, company reviews, salary data, and interview insights.

item.title: Federal Student Work Experience Program (FSWEP)
item.description: Government of Canada student hiring program for paid work across federal departments.

item.title: Canada's Top 100 Employers Career Directory
item.description: Canadian career directory highlighting employers with internship, co-op, and new graduate programs.

item.title: Built In
item.description: Technology career platform with internships and early-career roles at startups and tech companies.

item.title: Absolute Internship
item.description: Paid international internship placement program with structured roles and career coaching.

item.title: Zed Student
item.description: Student access to Zed with collaborative editing, AI features, and usage credits.

item.title: Wolfram Student
item.description: Student pricing for Wolfram tools used in math, computation, visualization, and engineering.

item.title: Unity Student Plan
item.description: Free Unity student access for game development, real-time 3D, and interactive projects.
